data.note: Nominal USD growth. Browser feasibility table shows 3.4% total 5-year growth. Annualized CAGR ≈ 0.67%. Default is nominal USD unless the user explicitly requests constant USD.

data_archived.note: ARCHIVED — Original GT used constant USD from API (exportValueConstGrowth5). Replaced with nominal USD to match default behavior. Constant USD CAGR was -0.69%.
